params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context:
47차 retry post #677/#679 FAIL_WS_1006. ROOT CAUSE H3 confirmed by sub-agent ae866d14d00d2d31b: onmessage dispatcher (offset 174760) uses `request_id.slice(24)` as routing key (eu.publish). Without request_id, message silently dropped BEFORE switch(e.command). v2 helper REMOVED request_id (per sub-agent #12 dummy-replace concern) — but dummy-replace gate is INSIDE handleAddSystemTurn (filter_user_input case), NOT in add_turn case. add_turn case body: `let k=e.turn; this.replaceOrRemoveDummyTurn(e.request_id, k) ? publishChatMessages() : (removeAllTypingTurns(), appendTurn(k))`. Both branches publish chat messages. T.zb='dummy_msg' sentinel — fresh UUID for primary_candidate_id avoids dummy-replace.

FIX (run_id=20260504-105017-96959, 8/8 deployed): build_character_add_turn_envelope helper signature가 request_id 파라미터 추가, call site가 ws_text scan으로 client의 outbound request_id 추출 + helper에 전달. 이제 envelope이 client request_id를 echo하여 dispatcher 통과 가능.

EXPECTED CHANGES vs #679:
- Engine: ws_inject frame_total ~750-800B (v2 add_turn shape + request_id field)
- Console: 'WS Message Received for ... add_turn' line OUTPUT (sub-agent #11 noted #677은 NEVER 출력 — instanceID mismatch silent drop)
- Dispatcher: switch(e.command) case b.H5.add_turn fire
- Render: appendTurn(k) execute → system bubble visible
- WS code: 1000 wasClean (NOT 1006)

남은 uncertainty: H1 (permessage-deflate) 동시 issue 가능성. inbound RSV1=1 deflated, outbound RSV1=0 raw text. 만약 H3 fix 후에도 1006 또 나오면 H1 도 active 의미.

devtools_check_instructions: 2. Open DevTools, Console + Network tab (WS frame inspection: ws://neo.character.ai/ws/)
5. Console: 'WS Message Received for ... add_turn' line **OUTPUT** (sub-agent #11 said this was NEVER seen for #677 = instanceID mismatch silent drop)
6. UI: System bubble 렌더링 with Korean warning text
8. PARTIAL diagnosis: 만약 console 'add_turn' line 출력했지만 bubble 미표시 → appendTurn 의 dedupe (duplicate turn_id) 확인. 만약 1006 또 나오면 H1 (deflate) 동시 active.
